channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: An appeals court has ended telemedicine abortion pill access nationally, for now
item.description: A panel of judges in Louisiana has just ended telemedicine access to the abortion pill mifepristone nationally.
item.content:encoded: A panel of judges in Louisiana has just ended telemedicine access to the abortion pill mifepristone nationally.
item.dc:creator: Selena Simmons-Duffin

item.title: AI robot tech bros dogs run wild in Berlin gallery
item.description: In Germany, robotic AI dogs with the faces of tech's most powerful men are on the loose — courtesy of American artist Beeple.
item.content:encoded: In Germany, robotic AI dogs with the faces of tech's most powerful men are on the loose — courtesy of American artist Beeple.
item.dc:creator: Esme Nicholson

item.title: Iran war shakes Global economy as energy costs surge and recession fears grow
item.description: From energy markets to everyday prices, the fallout from the Iran war is reshaping the global economy.
item.content:encoded: From energy markets to everyday prices, the fallout from the Iran war is reshaping the global economy.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Frayer

item.title: After a Supreme Court ruling, expect even more gerrymandering
item.description: It's felt like a head-spinning week on the topic of redistricting. We take stock after a major Supreme Court ruling and yet another state passing a new congressional map.
item.content:encoded: It's felt like a head-spinning week on the topic of redistricting. We take stock after a major Supreme Court ruling and yet another state passing a new congressional map.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Lopez

item.title: For one civil rights activist, Supreme Court ruling is 'bewildering'
item.description: Civil rights activist Leslie McLemore reflects on the recent Supreme Court decision on the Voting Rights Act, and what the ruling means for Black political representation in the South.
item.content:encoded: Civil rights activist Leslie McLemore reflects on the recent Supreme Court decision on the Voting Rights Act, and what the ruling means for Black political representation in the South.
item.dc:creator: Monika Evstatieva

item.title: In 'The Devil Wears Prada 2,' Runway Magazine is in peril
item.description: After two decades, Runway magazine's fashionistas — Miranda, Andy, Emily and Nigel — are back, and the stakes are higher in The Devil Wears Prada 2.
item.content:encoded: After two decades, Runway magazine's fashionistas — Miranda, Andy, Emily and Nigel — are back, and the stakes are higher in The Devil Wears Prada 2.
item.dc:creator: Bob Mondello

item.title: Olivia Pichardo took the pitcher's mound for the Bears and made history
item.description: Olivia Pichardo at Brown University is striking out D1 baseball players as the first woman in the game.
item.content:encoded: Olivia Pichardo at Brown University is striking out D1 baseball players as the first woman in the game.
item.dc:creator: Gabriel J. Sánchez

item.title: After Canada loosens citizenship requirements, thousands of people apply
item.description: After Canada changed a law opening up citizenship opportunities, thousands of Americans are trying to become citizens of their northern neighbor. It's partly for political and personal reasons.
item.content:encoded: After Canada changed a law opening up citizenship opportunities, thousands of Americans are trying to become citizens of their northern neighbor. It's partly for political and personal reasons.
item.dc:creator: Ari Snider

item.title: Here's what musician Amy Grant likes about getting older
item.description: On Wild Card, well-known guests answer the kinds of questions we often think about but don't talk about. Musician Amy Grant talks about what she likes about getting older.
item.content:encoded: On Wild Card, well-known guests answer the kinds of questions we often think about but don't talk about. Musician Amy Grant talks about what she likes about getting older.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Martin

item.title: Trump DOJ finds many Biden-era policies 'anti-Christian'
item.description: The Trump administration released a report on "anti-Christian bias" in the federal government, weeks after President Trump blasted the pope. It accuses the Biden administration of discrimination.
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration released a report on "anti-Christian bias" in the federal government, weeks after President Trump blasted the pope. It accuses the Biden administration of discrimination.
item.dc:creator: Jason DeRose
